flow.title: WhatsApp Flow
flow.subtitle: Build, send, and analyse interactive WhatsApp Forms
flow.search: Search flows by name or ID…

empty.title: No flows yet
empty.description: Create your first WhatsApp Flow to capture structured data right inside the chat — no friction, no form links.

appointment.title: Appointment booking
appointment.description: Collect date, time and contact details for a service booking.

lead.title: Lead capture
lead.description: Qualify inbound leads with name, company size and need.

nps.title: NPS survey
nps.description: 0–10 score plus an optional reason field.

support.title: Support intake
support.description: Triage tickets by category, severity and order ID.

feedback.title: Product feedback
feedback.description: Free-text plus rating to feed your roadmap.

filteredEmpty.title: No flows match these filters
filteredEmpty.description: Try widening your search or clearing one of the filters.

permissionEmpty.title: WhatsApp Flow access not enabled
permissionEmpty.description: Ask your admin to enable WhatsApp Flow for your role.

noWaba.title: Connect a WhatsApp Business Account
noWaba.description: WhatsApp Flow needs a connected WABA before flows can be created or published.

errors.loadHelp: Meta is having issues — list shown from cache (last sync: {{ago}}).
errors.concurrentEdit: Someone else just edited this flow. Reload to see changes.

banners.submissionsWarn: You've used {{used, number}} of {{cap, number}} submissions this month. Upgrade to Enterprise for unlimited.
banners.submissionsCap: You've reached this month's submission cap. New flows can be drafted but not published.
banners.publishedCap: You've reached the limit of {{cap, number}} published flows on your plan.

create.title: Create WhatsApp Flow
create.subtitle: Step 1 of 2 · Name and category
create.nameHelp: Visible to admins only. Customers never see this.
create.categoryHelp: Meta uses category to route conversations and price the conversation.
create.endpointLabel: Send submissions to your server (with endpoint)
create.endpointHelp: Receive a signed webhook for every submission. Pro plan: disabled — upgrade to Enterprise.

builder.title: {{name}} · Builder
builder.copiedJson: Meta Flow JSON copied to clipboard

unsaved.title: Discard your changes?
unsaved.description: You have unsaved edits to this flow.

delete.title: Delete this flow?
delete.description: This will permanently delete "{{name}}". Submissions will be retained per the data retention policy.
